title: helichrysum buschii
intro: Helichrysum buschii, also known as the yellow hill daisy, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene compounds, particularly bornyl acetate, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum buschii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne, as well as supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum buschii can be made into essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
